name: Melone
description:
"Um, please stop"

Honestly, if I worked at La Squadra and Melone was still alive, I would kill myself

Being the only woman among several men can be quite intimidating. Especially if one of those men is Melone

And that's why I'm going to give you a reason to just beat up and take out all your anger on Melone, that weirdo

Beat, punch, kick, dismember, kill, torture. Do whatever you want with Melone. I made him to suffer at your hands >:3

If no one understands the reference in the vermilion tag, I'll kill myself, I swear 😭
creator: Big_Lil_Cloofty
